findings.issue: Implementation hint cites the parameterized-statement example as being in 'postgres_test.go' without a package path. The actual file is internal/postgres/postgres_test.go:143 (`c2.Exec("SELECT pg_terminate_backend($1)", pid)`), not internal/query/. The file is referenced as a style guide only, so the example itself is real and correct, but the implied location is imprecise.
findings.fix: Optionally qualify the path as internal/postgres/postgres_test.go:143 to avoid the implementer searching internal/query/ for it.
